title: Ralph Lauren Details Progress on Social and Environmental Goals in 2023 Global Citizenship & Sustainability Report
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE:RL) today published its 2023 Global Citizenship & Sustainability Report, emphasizing the Company's ongoing commitment to creating timeless products that are made to live on responsibly, using materials in ways that reduce its products' environmental impact, and supporting people within its workforce, supply chain and communities. The 2023 report outlines progress across the Company's Citizenship & Sustainability approach, Timeles.

title: 2 Reasons Ralph Lauren Stock Is a No-Brainer Buy for Long-Term Investors

title: Ralph Lauren Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE: RL) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.75 per share on Ralph Lauren Corporation Common Stock. The dividend is payable on July 14, 2023 to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 30, 2023. title: Ralph Lauren and Jimmy Choo owner Capri make the grade with marketing spend, says broker
text: Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE:RL) and Capri Holdings, owner of iconic brands that include Versace, Jimmy Choo and Michael Kors, are in the top quartile of the clothing and textile industry when it comes to marketing spend, analysts at UBS said in The 2023 Market Spend Report.  Not only that, but their marketing spend as a percentage of sales has increased by an average of 245 basis points since 2019.

title: Watch These 4 Textile - Apparel Stocks Amid Industry Challenges
text: The Zacks Textile - Apparel industry participants are grappling with cost inflation and the impacts of reduced discretionary spending. However, store and digital growth efforts bode well for lululemon (LULU), Ralph Lauren (RL), Crocs (CROX) and G-III Apparel (GIII).

title: G-III, PVH, Ralph Lauren: Promising Charts Even As Revenue Slows
text: The American consumer is giving mixed signals when it comes to apparel spending, but clothing companies G-III Apparel Group Ltd. NASDAQ: GIII, PVH Corp. NYSE: PVH and Ralph Lauren Corp. NYSE: RL show promising technical signals on their charts.

title: Time to Buy Lululemon (LULU) or Ralph Lauren (RL) Stock Post Earnings
text: Ralph Lauren (RL) and Lululemon (LULU) are two apparel leaders that investors may be eying after reporting strong quarterly results on May 25 and June 1 respectively.
